title: Goniopteris nigrescentia

The genus Goniopteris is a group of ferns commonly known as chain ferns or chain tree ferns. Goniopteris nigrescentia is native to the tropical regions of the Americas, and its classification is part of the broader botanical system used to categorize plant species. The classification of Goniopteris nigrescentia is a combination of traditional binomial nomenclature and modern phylogenetic analysis.
